title: Fuyutsuki meeting Seele agent on houseboat not found
display_title: Fuyutsuki meeting Seele agent on houseboat not found
wikitext:
[]: 'Fuyutsuki meeting Seele agent on houseboat' not found.             Quote Post by scorpew » Sun Jul 28, 2019 11:31 am Hello people, I was re-watching NGE (on Netflix, because it's easier while I know some changes were done) due to the 3.0+1.0 trailer and because the first time I watched it, I couldn't appreciate many things as I wasn't aware of how subliminal the plot was (I was constantly waiting to a character to directly tell me what happened during the serie or something), but now I know much more and the plot is more interesting. Well, I finished watching episode 21, but I couldn't understand many things, so, I went to the episode 21 wiki page and read all the plot (still don't understand what the hell was Kanji doing), but then I realize that the 'On-Air Version Differences' section tells this: The scene of Fuyutsuki meeting the agent sent by Gendo/Seele on the houseboat is not included.

[]: Re: 'Fuyutsuki meeting Seelse agent on houseboat' not found.             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 28, 2019 1:06 pm Here , scene that starts C070, C310.

[]: Re: 'Fuyutsuki meeting Seelse agent on houseboat' not found.             Quote Post by scorpew » Sun Jul 28, 2019 1:12 pm Reichu wrote: Here , scene that starts C070, C310.

chunks.content:
Article: Fuyutsuki meeting Seele agent on houseboat not found
[]: 'Fuyutsuki meeting Seele agent on houseboat' not found.             Quote Post by scorpew » Sun Jul 28, 2019 11:31 am Hello people, I was re-watching NGE (on Netflix, because it's easier while I know some changes were done) due to the 3.0+1.0 trailer and because the first time I watched it, I couldn't appreciate many things as I wasn't aware of how subliminal the plot was (I was constantly waiting to a character to directly tell me what happened during the serie or something), but now I know much more and the plot is more interesting. Well, I finished watching episode 21, but I couldn't understand many things, so, I went to the episode 21 wiki page and read all the plot (still don't understand what the hell was Kanji doing), but then I realize that the 'On-Air Version Differences' section tells this: The scene of Fuyutsuki meeting the agent sent by Gendo/Seele on the houseboat is not included.

[]: Re: 'Fuyutsuki meeting Seelse agent on houseboat' not found.             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 28, 2019 1:06 pm Here , scene that starts C070, C310.

[]: Re: 'Fuyutsuki meeting Seelse agent on houseboat' not found.             Quote Post by scorpew » Sun Jul 28, 2019 1:12 pm Reichu wrote: Here , scene that starts C070, C310.
